label: CONCERNS
description: Datum is about an Actor (anchor for personal-data classification).

label: IDENTIFIES
description: Datum permits identification of the Actor.

label: CATEGORY
description: Datum has a special-category tag.

label: CONTROLLER
description: Actor determines purposes and means of processing.

label: PROCESSOR
description: Actor processes on behalf of the controller.

label: IN_CONTEXT_OF_ESTABLISHMENT
description: Processing in the context of activities of Actor's EU establishment.

label: PROVIDER
description: Actor provides (develops + places on market / puts into service) the AI system.

label: DEPLOYER
description: Actor uses the AI system under its authority.

label: IMPORTER
description: EU-located actor places third-country AI system on EU market.

label: DISTRIBUTOR
description: Actor in supply chain makes AI system available on the market.

label: MANUFACTURER
description: Product manufacturer placing on market a product with AI system as safety component.

label: AUTH_REPRESENTATIVE
description: EU-mandated representative of a non-EU provider.

label: ESTABLISHED_IN
description: Actor has stable establishment in the jurisdiction.

label: LOCATED_IN
description: Actor is physically located in the jurisdiction.

label: TARGETS_EU_SUBJECTS_OF
description: Scenario offers goods/services to EU data subjects.

label: MONITORS_EU_BEHAVIOUR
description: Scenario monitors EU data-subject behaviour.

label: PLACES_ON_EU_MARKET
description: Actor places AI system on EU market.

label: PUTS_INTO_SERVICE_EU
description: Actor puts AI system into service in EU.

label: MADE_AVAILABLE_ON_MARKET
description: AI system made available on the market in the named jurisdiction.

label: PLACES_PRODUCT_ON_EU_MARKET
description: Manufacturer places AI-containing product on EU market under their name.

label: HAS_FEATURE
description: Scenario carries a closed-vocabulary feature tag.

label: HAS_CAPABILITY
description: Scenario has a capability tag (anchors Art 3(1) AI-system definition).

label: USED_IN
description: AI system is used in an Annex III use-case category.

label: SAFETY_COMPONENT_OF
description: AI system is a safety component of the product.

label: THIRD_PARTY_ASSESSMENT_UNDER
description: Product requires third-party conformity assessment under Annex I legislation.

label: GDPR_TERRITORIAL_LINK
description: Engine-derived: Actor anchors GDPR territorial scope to Scenario.

label: AI_ACT_TERRITORIAL_LINK
description: Engine-derived: Actor anchors AI Act territorial scope to AI system.

label: OF_SCENARIO
description: Applicability event points at the Scenario it judges.

label: UNDER_REGULATION
description: Applicability event points at the Regulation.

label: VIA_ACTOR
description: Applicability event records which Actor anchored territorial scope.

label: OF_PROVISION
description: ApplicationDate event points at the Provision it dates.

label: OF_REGULATION
description: ApplicationDate event points at the Regulation.

label: UNDER_REGULATION
description: TransitionalGrace event points at the Regulation.
